title: Merkle Import Receipt v1
description: Cross-town receipt carrying authenticated Merkle inclusion proof from issuer town's ledger. Proves remote event inclusion without downloading full ledger.

rid.description: Unique receipt ID (UUID hex or deterministic hash). Used for anti-replay.

issuer_town.description: Town ID claiming the ledger root (e.g., 'Town_A')

issuer_seal_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the seal_v3 receipt that anchors this Merkle root. Receiver must validate this seal exists and binds the root.

ledger_size.description: Number of leaves in Merkle tree (must be power of 2)

ledger_merkle_root.description: Root hash of Merkle tree over issuer's ledger events (SHA256 hex)

claim.description: The claim being proven (event inclusion, tip verification, etc.)

kind.description: Claim: 'Event at sequence seq exists and matches this canonical hash'

event_canon_sha256.description: SHA256 of canonical event JSON (receiver can recompute leaf hash from this)

event_canonical_bytes.description: Optional: full canonical JSON of event (base64-encoded). If provided, receiver can verify event_canon_sha256 by recomputing.

proof.description: Merkle inclusion proof (path of sibling hashes)

leaf.description: Leaf hash for the claimed event (domain-separated: H('CWL_LEDGER_LEAF_V1' || canonical_event_bytes))

path.description: List of sibling hashes from leaf to root (in tree traversal order)

index.description: Position of leaf in tree (0-indexed). Must match tree structure.

sig.description: Ed25519 signature by issuer_town over entire merkle_import_v1 receipt (minus sig field itself). Binds claim to issuer.
